mapper.select: SELECT bg.checkpoints_timed, bg.checkpoints_req, bg.checkpoint_write_time, bg.checkpoint_sync_time, bg.buffers_checkpoint, bg.buffers_backend, bg.stats_reset, -- Checkpoint Distance 계산: 마지막 체크포인트 이후 WAL 사용률 ROUND( (pg_wal_lsn_diff(pg_current_wal_lsn(), cp.checkpoint_lsn) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT setting::bigint FROM pg_settings WHERE name = 'max_wal_size') * 1024 * 1024, 0)) , 2) as checkpoint_distance_percent, -- WAL 파일 정보 (SELECT count(*) FROM pg_ls_waldir()) as wal_files_total, -- 평균 버퍼/초 계산 (최근 체크포인트 기준) CASE WHEN bg.checkpoint_write_time > 0 THEN ROUND(bg.buffers_checkpoint::numeric / (bg.checkpoint_write_time / 1000.0)) ELSE 0 END as avg_buffers_per_sec FROM pg_stat_bgwriter bg CROSS JOIN pg_control_checkpoint() cp
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkpoint_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, buffers_backend, avg_buffers_per_sec, wal_bytes, wal_files_added, wal_files_removed, checkpoint_distance, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{checkpointType}, #{checkpointsTimed}, #{checkpointsReq}, #{checkpointWriteTime}, #{checkpointSyncTime}, #{buffersCheckpoint}, #{buffersBackend}, #{avgBuffersPerSec}, #{walBytes}, #{walFilesAdded}, #{walFilesRemoved}, #{checkpointDistance}, NOW() )
mapper.select: WITH time_buckets AS ( SELECT date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '2 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM collected_at) / 2) AS bucket_time, TO_CHAR( date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '2 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM collected_at) / 2), 'HH24:MI' ) AS time_label, checkpoints_req, checkpoints_timed, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, checkpoint_write_time + checkpoint_sync_time AS total_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes, collected_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - LAG(collected_at) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at))) / 60.0 AS interval_minutes FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ) SELECT time_label, bucket_time, SUM(checkpoints_req) AS requested_count, SUM(checkpoints_timed) AS timed_count, AVG(checkpoint_write_time) AS avg_write_time, AVG(checkpoint_sync_time) AS avg_sync_time, AVG(total_time) AS avg_total_time, SUM(wal_bytes) AS wal_bytes, SUM(buffers_checkpoint) AS buffers_checkpoint, AVG(interval_minutes) AS avg_interval_minutes FROM time_buckets GROUP BY time_label, bucket_time ORDER BY bucket_time

WITH checkpoint_intervals AS ( SELECT buffers_checkpoint, checkpoint_write_time + checkpoint_sync_time AS total_time, checkpoint_distance, CASE WHEN (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) > 0 THEN (checkpoints_req::NUMERIC / (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS request_ratio, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - LAG(collected_at) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at))) / 60 AS checkpoint_interval, wal_bytes / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0 * 60 AS avg_wal_generation_speed FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - (#{minutes} || ' minutes')::INTERVAL ) SELECT AVG(buffers_checkpoint) AS buffers_checkpoint, AVG(total_time) AS total_time, AVG(checkpoint_distance) AS checkpoint_distance, AVG(request_ratio) AS request_ratio, AVG(checkpoint_interval) AS checkpoint_interval, AVG(avg_wal_generation_speed) AS avg_wal_generation_speed FROM checkpoint_intervals

SELECT SUM(checkpoints_req) AS checkpoints_req, SUM(checkpoints_timed) AS checkpoints_timed, CASE WHEN (SUM(checkpoints_req) + SUM(checkpoints_timed)) > 0 THEN (SUM(checkpoints_req)::NUMERIC / (SUM(checkpoints_req) + SUM(checkpoints_timed)) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS request_ratio FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

WITH checkpoint_intervals AS ( SELECT buffers_checkpoint, checkpoint_write_time + checkpoint_sync_time AS total_time, checkpoint_distance, CASE WHEN (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) > 0 THEN (checkpoints_req::NUMERIC / (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS request_ratio, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - LAG(collected_at) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at))) / 60 AS checkpoint_interval, wal_bytes / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0 * 60 AS avg_wal_generation_speed FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN NOW() - (#{minutes} * 2 || ' minutes')::INTERVAL AND NOW() - (#{minutes} || ' minutes')::INTERVAL ) SELECT AVG(buffers_checkpoint) AS buffers_checkpoint, AVG(total_time) AS total_time, AVG(checkpoint_distance) AS checkpoint_distance, AVG(request_ratio) AS request_ratio, AVG(checkpoint_interval) AS checkpoint_interval, AVG(avg_wal_generation_speed) AS avg_wal_generation_speed FROM checkpoint_intervals

SELECT checkpoint_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, buffers_backend, avg_buffers_per_sec, wal_bytes, wal_files_added, wal_files_removed, checkpoint_distance, created_at FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
